title: marketing — authorization policies
description: Four policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission, then narrows by tenant scope. Write actions on MarketingEvent are NEVER allowed via API — events are captured only from the domain-event listener path (prevents replay attacks). Support-tool re-dispatch endpoints run through the platform plane.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with marketing_capture entitlement + owner/admin/marketing role
events are captured ONLY via the MarketingEventCapturer listener path — no direct API create. Attempted creates return 403 MARKETING_EVENT_MANUAL_CREATE_FORBIDDEN.
events are append-only after capture
financial retention; purged by PurgeExpiredMarketingDataJob only

admin + owner + support only — re-dispatches an existing event through the fan-out (idempotent — the deduplication_key on marketing_deliveries prevents provider double-fires when the provider supports the event_id contract)
same as view
ops + marketing role + support role. Members do NOT see delivery-level details (that's ops-visible).
deliveries are created by the DispatchToProviderJob path only
per-attempt-immutable after create
cross-tenant support — every fire is audit-critical
owner + admin + marketing role. Support role sees redacted view (no config credentials).
config field returned encrypted; support role sees redacted view
owner + admin only — provider credentials are financial-critical
owner + admin only
owner + admin only
owner + admin. Test mode dispatches to sandbox endpoints.
owner + admin + platform_ops. Every reset writes an audit row + increments circuit_breaker_reset_count.
platform_ops + support (redacted config)
owner + admin + marketing role. Support role sees cross-tenant view.
owner + admin + platform_ops. Requires `marketing_dead_letter_replay` entitlement (Enterprise-only).
owner + admin + platform_ops. Mark as resolved without replay (ops decision — provider event was replayed manually or is intentionally lost)
platform_ops + support cross-tenant P1 review
platform_ops only — cross-tenant replay for support intervention
